Question:
What is the average carbonate weathering flux in PJ for ecosystems hosting a low-activity, Type II (alphaproteobacterial-dominant) methanotroph community and microfragment hotspots concentrated near agricultural run-off zones?

Restrict the calculation to:

1) episodic debris-dominated bolus delivery after wildfire with pronounced forward-scattering anisotropy from specular shiny surfaces
2) supply-limited seasonal pulses dominated by bank collapse with an intermediate rooting depth median of about 50 centimetres and mild anisotropy with detectable forward scattering at low solar zenith angles
3) transport-limited chronic fine sediment export from cultivated/farmed slopes with backscatter-dominant anisotropy associated with rough microfacets
